title: Why Crude’s Rally Vanished on March 9 and What Trump Said
author: tickeron_community
selftext: Crude’s explosive war‑driven spike faded on March 9 because the market suddenly started to price **less extreme, shorter‑lived supply risk** and **more policy intervention**, not a multi‑month shortage. [WTI](https://tickeron.com/ticker/WTI/), which had briefly traded above 115–120 dollars on Iran‑war headlines and Strait of Hormuz fears, slid back toward the high‑80s as traders digested G7 reserve‑release talk, Trump’s comments about a “brief” war, and the reality that prices had run far ahead of fundamentals.
